pr.title: SwiGLU dim=576 + Sliding Window + Muon WD (1.2091 BPB)

output.summary: Auto-searched wider 7-layer SwiGLU with Muon weight decay, FP16 embedding pass-through, and sliding-window eval to shrink artifacts under 16MB.
techniques: width-focused SwiGLU dim=576 model found via automated search
Muon optimizer with 0.02 weight decay plus FP16 embedding passthrough for quantization robustness
sliding-window stride=64 eval paired with 60% wallclock warmdown
